company.name: AutoStream
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators. Powered by AI, it helps YouTubers, Instagrammers, and other creators edit videos faster, add captions, and produce professional-quality content without manual effort.

policies.details: No refunds are provided after 7 days from the date of purchase. Refunds within the first 7 days are handled on a case-by-case basis.
24/7 live support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users receive standard email support with responses within 24–48 hours.
All plans are billed monthly. Annual billing with a 20% discount is available on request.
Basic plan is limited to 10 videos per month. Unused videos do not roll over. Pro plan has no video limit.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. The price difference is prorated for the remaining billing period.

faqs.question: What platforms are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports content creators from YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, Facebook, and LinkedIn.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: We offer a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan. No credit card required to start.

faqs.question: What video formats are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM formats for upload and export.
